---
title: "extractLand Manual"
subtitle: "v.`r SpaDES.core::moduleMetadata(module = 'extractLand', path = '..')$version`"
date: "Last updated: `r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: sandstone
    number_sections: false
    df_print: paged
    keep_md: yes
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
bibliography: citations/references_extractLand.bib
link-citations: true
always_allow_html: true
---

# extractLand Module

<!-- the following are text references used in captions for LaTeX compatibility -->
(ref:extractLand) *extractLand*

```{r setup-extractLand, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE, results = "hold") ## change to eval = TRUE if all chunks are to be evaluated

dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)

download.file(url = "https://img.shields.io/badge/Made%20with-Markdown-1f425f.png",
              destfile = "figures/markdownBadge.png",
              mode = "wb")
```

[![made-with-Markdown](figures/markdownBadge.png)](https://commonmark.org)

<!-- if knitting to pdf remember to add the pandoc_args: ["--extract-media", "."] option to yml in order to get the badge images -->

#### Authors:

`r paste(as.character(SpaDES.core::moduleMetadata(module = "extractLand", path = '..')$authors), sep = ', ')`
<!-- ideally separate authors with new lines, '\n' not working -->

## Module Overview

### Module summary

Once the landscape variables are prepared, this module uses the tracks from prepTracks to extract the landscape variables at the start and end point of each step, calculates the distance to anthropogenic disturbances, and extracts the ecoregion for each point.

### Module inputs and parameters

Describe input data required by the module and how to obtain it (e.g., directly from online sources or supplied by other modules)
If `sourceURL` is specified, `downloadData("extractLand", "C:/Users/rmcinnes/Documents/prepLocTracks")` may be sufficient.

Table \@ref(tab:moduleInputs-extractLand) shows the full list of module inputs.

```{r moduleInputs-extractLand, echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
df_inputs <- SpaDES.core::moduleInputs("extractLand", "C:/Users/rmcinnes/Documents/prepLocTracks")
knitr::kable(df_inputs,
             caption = "List of (ref:extractLand) input objects and their description.") |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width = TRUE)
```

Summary of user-visible parameters (Table \@ref(tab:moduleParams-extractLand))


```{r moduleParams-extractLand, echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
df_params <- SpaDES.core::moduleParams("extractLand", "C:/Users/rmcinnes/Documents/prepLocTracks")
knitr::kable(df_params, caption = "List of (ref:extractLand) parameters and their description.") |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width = TRUE)
```

### Events

A single event that runs the extraction process of the tracks supplied by prepTracks

### Plotting

Write what is plotted.

### Saving

Write what is saved.

### Module outputs

Description of the module outputs (Table \@ref(tab:moduleOutputs-extractLand)).

"extractedVariables" is a data.table containing all the track information as well as the landscape variables and distance calculations to be used in a iSSA model.

```{r moduleOutputs-extractLand, echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
df_outputs <- SpaDES.core::moduleOutputs("extractLand", "C:/Users/rmcinnes/Documents/prepLocTracks")
knitr::kable(df_outputs, caption = "List of (ref:extractLand) outputs and their description.") |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width = TRUE)
```

### Links to other modules

Describe any anticipated linkages to other modules, such as modules that supply input data or do post-hoc analysis.

### Getting help

-   provide a way for people to obtain help (e.g., module repository issues page)

## References

<!-- autogenerated from bibligraphy -->
